🆕Boston Large 25cm✨
🔥This Dior Groove 25 bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from pink calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm is adorned with the Christian Dior Paris logo and gold-finished stars, making it unique. The bag opens with a zip lock and key charm. The spacious compartment features an open pocket and a zip pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Model: 8810
Dimensions: 25x 19x 16cm (L x H x W)

Top-tier original with full packaging
Dior Groove♣️16 Mini Bag 'White Embossed Quilted'
This Dior Groove 16 Mini Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from white calfskin with embossing, it features a large quilted effect houndstooth pattern to elevate the style. The spacious compartment can hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily styling.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick

Dior Groove♣️ 20 Bag 'Small White Embossed Quilted'
This Dior Groove 20 Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from white calfskin with embossing, it features a large quilted effect houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, unique and distinctive. The zipper lock can be opened with the attached key. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily styling.
Zipper closure, with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key pouch embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, with key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 phone, 1 wallet, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick

🖤Small LADY D-JOY Bag 'Apricot Lambskin'
This Lady D-Joy bag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black patent leather, it features a striking quilted detail with classic woven check stitching, revealing exquisite craftsmanship. The matching metal D.I.O.R. charm adds an elegant touch. The small size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily looks.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather strap
Model: 9240
Size: 22 x 12 x 6 cm

Top-tier factory with full packaging
🖤 Medium Lady D-Joy Handbag 'Matte Black'
This Lady D-Joy handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black matte calfskin, it features a striking quilted detail with classic diagonal quilting and exquisite stitching. A matching metal D.I.O.R. charm adds an elegant touch. The medium size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Model: 9250
Dimensions: 26×13.5×5 cm
Fits one iPhone and other accessories
